SFC.Title: Sephral’s File Commander
SFC.Description: Browse Foundry storage in a two-pane commander.
SFC.Settings.Menu.Name: Sephral’s File Commander
SFC.Settings.Menu.Label: Open File Commander
SFC.Settings.Menu.Hint: Open the two-pane file commander directly.
SFC.Settings.RestoreState.Name: Restore last session
SFC.Settings.RestoreState.Hint: Remember the last active pane, storage, path, and selection when reopening the commander.
SFC.Settings.SceneControl.Name: Show scene control button
SFC.Settings.SceneControl.Hint: Show a File Commander icon in the left scene controls.
SFC.Settings.DefaultLeft.Name: Default left source
SFC.Settings.DefaultLeft.Hint: Choose the storage that the left pane uses when no previous session is restored.
SFC.Settings.DefaultRight.Name: Default right source
SFC.Settings.DefaultRight.Hint: Choose the storage that the right pane uses when no previous session is restored.
SFC.Controls.Title: Sephral’s File Commander
SFC.Toolbar.Unsupported: Move, rename, and delete are reserved for a later version because Foundry core does not expose a safe cross-platform client API for those commands.
SFC.Column.Name: Name
SFC.Status.Help: Hotkeys: Arrow keys navigate, Enter opens, Tab switches pane, F5 copies, F7 creates a folder, Ctrl+U uploads, Backspace goes up, Ctrl+R refreshes.
SFC.Dialog.NewFolder.Title: Create Directory
SFC.Dialog.NewFolder.Label: Directory name
SFC.Notification.NoSelection: Select a file or directory first.
SFC.Notification.CopyUnsupported: The target storage does not allow uploads or directory creation.
SFC.Error.NoWritableTarget: The opposite pane must point to a writable storage.
SFC.Error.FetchFailed: The selected file could not be downloaded for copying.
SFC.Error.MissingBucket: Choose an S3 bucket before browsing this storage.
SFC.Error.SameTarget: Source and target path are identical.
